skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120s) with professional cinematography, scriptwriting, and transitions.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Evaluated 534 static findings across 13 files (2110 lines). All patterns are legitimate CLI tool usage patterns. The skill is a wrapper for the Pexo AI video generation API that uses shell scripts for API communication. Shell command substitution in scripts (curl, jq) is standard CLI practice. API key access is limited to authentication with pexo.ai. No evidence of credential exfiltration or malicious intent. Documentation files contain example commands shown to users, not actual execution.

content.user_title: Create professional AI videos in 5-120 seconds
content.value_statement: Professional video production requires expensive equipment and expertise. Pexo AI Video Agent automates short video creation, generating cinematic content with scriptwriting, transitions, and music for product ads, social media, and brand videos.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) with professional cinematography
Create product ads, brand videos, explainers, and social media content
Support multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 for different platforms
Upload and incorporate user images, videos, and audio into productions
Handle multi-turn conversations for revisions and preview selections
Poll and monitor video generation progress with status updates
limitations: Requires valid PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL configuration
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for short clips, longer for complex content
Cannot crawl web URLs for assets; local files must be uploaded first
Credits required per message to Pexo backend; costs accumulate with revisions

use_cases.title: Product advertising videos
use_cases.description: Upload product images and describe the ad concept. Pexo generates a professional product commercial with appropriate visuals and pacing.

use_cases.title: Social media content
use_cases.description: Create vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. Pexo handles aspect ratio and platform-appropriate formatting.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators, influencers, social media managers

use_cases.title: Brand and explainer videos
use_cases.description: Generate brand story videos or product explainers with transitions, music, and professional editing handled automatically.

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 15-second product video for my handmade jewelry brand showcasing a silver necklace
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner user wanting a basic promotional clip

prompt_templates.title: Video with uploaded assets
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second brand video using the product photos I uploaded. Focus on the craftsmanship and materials.
prompt_templates.scenario: User with reference images wanting tailored content

prompt_templates.title: Multi-part request
prompt_templates.prompt: Make three variations: a 15-second Instagram Reel, a 30-second YouTube intro, and a 60-second full brand story
prompt_templates.scenario: User needing multiple formats from one project

prompt_templates.title: Revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: The video is good but can you make the transitions smoother and add more close-up shots of the product?
prompt_templates.scenario: User requesting refinements to an existing video

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second product video for my coffee brand
Upload product.jpg and request brand video

best_practices: Let Pexo handle creative decisions. Focus on describing the product and desired mood rather than specific technical parameters.
Upload high-quality reference images when possible. Asset uploads significantly improve relevance and visual quality.
Consolidate feedback into single revision requests to minimize token costs and avoid duplicate video generation.
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style parameters unless the user explicitly requested them. Let Pexo use its professional judgment.
Do not make multiple chat calls while waiting. Only poll for status; chat calls during WAIT state trigger duplicate productions.
Do not truncate the video download URL. Include all query parameters (OSSAccessKeyId, Expires, Signature) or the download will fail with 403.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short 15-second videos take approximately 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos take longer. The skill polls for status and notifies you when complete.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for uploads?
faq.answer: Images: jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic, heif. Videos: mp4, mov, avi. Audio: mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac.

faq.question: Can I create videos for multiple platforms at once?
faq.answer: Yes, specify your requirements in one message (e.g., 15s Instagram Reel, 30s YouTube intro, 60s brand story). Pexo can generate multiple outputs from one project.

faq.question: What if I need changes to the generated video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id and send revision requests via pexo-chat. Consolidate all feedback into one message for efficiency.

faq.question: Why did my download URL fail with 403 Forbidden?
faq.answer: You likely truncated the URL. The download URL includes query parameters (OSSAccessKeyId, Expires, Signature) that are required. Copy the complete URL from the JSON output.

faq.question: How much does this cost?
faq.answer: Each message to Pexo costs tokens. The skill warns about credit balance errors and directs you to purchase credits at pexo.ai if needed.
